versions.version_description: This version is adapted to standard tuning, easy to read because all parts are with chords, contains all lyrics.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Mom In Love Daddy In Space

content:
Papa Roach
Scars
Getting Away With Murder
2004 Geffen Records
Submitted by: paramore_fans@yahoo.com

This is 100% correct

Key: [ch]B[/ch]

Tuning: Standard EADGBe

Chords used:
[ch]B[/ch] -     x24442 
[ch]F#[/ch] -    244322
[ch]C#m[/ch] -   x46654
[ch]G#m[/ch] -   466444
[ch]E[/ch] -     022100
[ch]Ebm[/ch] -   x68876
[ch]F#[/ch]/[ch]Bb[/ch] - x143xx


Intro:
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]F#[/ch]                [ch]C#m[/ch]
  I tear my heart open I sew myself shut[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]
And my weakness is that I care too much[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]            [ch]F#[/ch]                       [ch]C#m[/ch]
  My scars remind me that the past is real[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]F#[/ch]
I tear my heart open just to feel[/tab]


Verse 1:
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                      [ch]Ebm[/ch]
   Drunk and I'm feeling down[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]E[/ch]
And I just wanna be alone[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]F#[/ch]
I'm pissed cause you came around[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G#m[/ch]
Why don't just go home[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Ebm[/ch]
Cause you channel all your pain[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]E[/ch]
And I can't help you fix yourself[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#[/ch]
You're making me insane[/tab]

All I can say is


Chorus:
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]F#[/ch]                [ch]C#m[/ch]
  I tear my heart open I sew myself shut[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]F#[/ch]
And my weakness is that I care too much[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]            [ch]F#[/ch]/[ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]C#m[/ch]
  My scars remind us that the past is real[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]F#[/ch]
I tear my heart open just to feel[/tab]


Verse 2:
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                    [ch]Ebm[/ch]
   I tried to help you once[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]
Against my own advice[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#[/ch]
I saw you going down[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G#m[/ch]
But you never realized[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Ebm[/ch]
That you're drowning in the water[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]E[/ch]
So I offered you my hand[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F#[/ch]
Compassions in my nature[/tab]
Tonight is our last stand



(Repeat Chorus)


Bridge:
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                          [ch]Ebm[/ch]
   I'm drunk and I'm feeling down[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]E[/ch]
And I just wanna be alone[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]F#[/ch]
You shouldn't ever came around[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G#m[/ch]
Why don't you just go home?[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Ebm[/ch]
Cause you're drowning in the water[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]E[/ch]
And I tried to grab your hand[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#[/ch]
I left my heart open[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]B[/ch](hold)
But you didn't understand[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F#[/ch](hold)
But you didn't understand[/tab]


Growl:
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]F#[/ch]
Go fix yourself[/tab]


Verse 3:
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
  I can't help you fix yourself[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
  But at least I could say I tried[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
   I'm sorry but I gotta [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]F#[/ch]
move on with my own life[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
  I can't help you fix yourself[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]/[ch]Bb[/ch]
     But at least I could say I tried[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
   I'm sorry but I gotta [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch](hold)
move on with my own life[/tab]


(Repeat Chorus twice)


Outro: [ch]B[/ch](hold)
